whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Westbury residents for years with fast, reliable ant control solutions tailored to Long Island's unique pest challenges. Our licensed exterminators use safe, effective treatments and offer guaranteed results with transparent pricing from $350 to $550.
localContext: Westbury's mix of historic homes near Old Westbury Gardens, modern residential developments, and commercial properties along Post Avenue creates diverse environments where ants thrive. From carpenter ants in older wood structures to pavement ants around the Westbury LIRR station area, we understand the specific ant problems facing local property owners.

faqs.question: What types of ants are common in Westbury homes?
faqs.answer: Westbury properties commonly experience carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly prevalent in older homes with wood structures, while pavement ants often invade through foundation cracks. Our technicians identify the species and customize treatment accordingly.

faqs.question: How much does ant control cost in Westbury?
faqs.answer: Our ant control services in Westbury range from $350 to $550, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and type of ant species. This includes inspection, treatment, and follow-up service. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to ant problems in Westbury?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service for ant control in Westbury and throughout Long Island. Most treatments can be completed in one visit, with follow-up appointments scheduled as needed to ensure complete elimination of the colony.

faqs.question: Are your ant control treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and application methods that are safe for families and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. We provide clear instructions on any precautions needed during and after treatment, and can discuss pet-friendly and eco-friendly options for sensitive households.
